name: CONTRACT-BUG-26
title: run.py does not invoke test-find-feature.py or test-relink.py; tests/test_python_scripts.py orphan
description: test/run.py does not invoke test-find-feature.py or test-relink.py. test-relink.py tests a deleted scripts/relink.sh and is dead code. tests/test_python_scripts.py lives in a parallel directory and is never run.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 1: validate-feature.py run.py path; check-naming.py rbt- prefix; module docstrings; runner invokes all tests; dead tests deleted.
